name: Berlinerkranzer/Christmas Cookbook
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: CHRISTMAS COOKBOOK
1. Mix 1 cup sugar, softened butter, shortening, and grated orange peel.
2. Add whole eggs to the mixture.
3. Stir in 1 cup all-purpose flour.
4. Shape the dough into rounded teaspoonfuls, forming ropes about 6 inches long and 1/4 inch in diameter.
5. Form each rope into a circle, crossing the ends and tucking under (easier than tying knots).
6. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
8. Beat egg white and 2 tablespoons sugar until foamy; brush over tops of cookies.
9. For holly berries, press bits of red candied cherries onto the center of each knot.
10. Add small jagged leaves cut from green candied citron.
11. Bake until set but not brown, about 10-12 minutes.
12. Remove immediately from cookie sheet. Yield: About 6 dozen cookies.
